title: Le Tour de Frankie: 800 km Across the Sierra Mixteca
content:
Poli is a member of Old Man Mountain Rack’s Experimental Bikepacking Team. She recently completed Le Tour de Frankie for the third time, exploring what keeps her coming back to the challenge of racing Mexico’s most difficult ultracycling event.

The post Le Tour de Frankie: 800 km Across the Sierra Mixteca appeared first on The Radavist.
author: spencer harding
